description_long: This is a pair of high-heeled ankle boots with a sleek, modern design, primarily white with black accents. The boots feature a pointed toe and a tall, slender stiletto heel, giving them an elegant and fashionable appearance. Decorative black stitching runs along the top edge and down the sides, with four prominent round buttons on the outer side of each boot, adding a vintage-inspired touch. The soles are slightly textured, and the interior appears to be lined in black. The boots are constructed from a smooth, likely synthetic or leather material, with a firm structure and minimal embellishments aside from the buttons and stitching. These shoes are suitable for urban environments, such as city streets or fashionable neighborhoods.
description: A pair of white high-heeled ankle boots with black stitching, round side buttons, and pointed toes, featuring a sleek and stylish design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the four decorative buttons and black stitching detail along the upper edge and side.
description_view_1: Front angle highlighting the pointed toe, tall stiletto heel, and the smooth, uninterrupted vamp.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the vertical black stitching running down the back and the slim heel.
description_view_3: Angled side view emphasizing the button row, stitching, and the overall silhouette of the boots.
